memberdef.type: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
memberdef.name: pendingHeadsByRootCID_

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< RocksDB > aDatastore, const HierarchicalKey &aKey, std::shared_ptr< DAGSyncer > aDagSyncer, std::shared_ptr< Broadcaster > aBroadcaster, std::shared_ptr< CrdtOptions > aOptions)
memberdef.name: New

briefdescription.para: Factory method to create a shared_ptr to a CrdtDatastore.

parameterdescription.para: The underlying database where CRDT is stored
The namespace key on the database where CRDT's variables will be stored
The MerkleDAG syncer to request content of CIDs
The broadcaster to publish CIDs
Options to construct the object

detaileddescription.para:
Static function to merge delta elements and tombstones, use highest priority for the result delta
aDelta1
Delta to merge
aDelta2
Delta to merge
pointer to merged delta

Get value suffix used in set, e.g. /v
value suffix

DecodeBroadcast decodes CRDT broadcast data
buff
Buffer data to decode
vector of CIDs or outcome::failure on error

Returns a new delta-set adding the given key/value.
key
- delta key to add to datastore
value
- delta value to add to datastore
pointer to new delta or outcome::failure on error

Get the value of an element not tombstoned from the CRDT set by key
aKey
Hierarchical key to get
value as a Buffer

Query CRDT set key-value pairs by prefix, if prefix empty return all elements are not tombstoned
aPrefix
prefix to search, if empty string, return all
list of key-value pairs matches prefix

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &prefix_base, const std::string &middle_part, const std::string &remainder_prefix) const
memberdef.name: QueryKeyValues

briefdescription.para: Queries with a middle part that can be a wildcard, negated string or normal string.

parameterdescription.para: The base prefix to query
Either a string (normal query), '*' or !string
The remainder part of the query prefix

simplesect.para: A list of key value pairs

detaileddescription.para:
Get key prefix used in set, e.g. /namespace/s/k/
key prefix

memberdef.argsstring: (const HierarchicalKey &aKey, const Buffer &aValue, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &topics)
memberdef.name: PutKey

briefdescription.para: Stores the given value in the CRDT store.

parameterdescription.para: Hierarchical key to put
Value to be stored
Topics to publish to

simplesect.para: outcome::success if stored and broadcasted successfully, or outcome::failure otherwise.

detaileddescription.para:
HasKey returns whether the key is mapped to a value in set
aKey
HierarchicalKey to look for in set
true if key found or false if not found or outcome::failure on error

Delete removes the value for given key.
aKey
HierarchicalKey to delete from set
topics
Topics to publish to
outcome::failure on error or success otherwise

briefdescription.para: Publishes a Delta. Creates a DAG node from the given Delta, merges it into the CRDT, and broadcasts the node.

parameterdescription.para: Delta to publish
Topics to publish to

simplesect.para: returns outcome::success on success or outcome::failure otherwise

detaileddescription.para:
PrintDAG pretty prints the current Merkle-DAG using the given printFunc
returns outcome::success on success or outcome::failure otherwise

Returns a new delta-set removing the given keys with prefix /namespace/s/key
key
- delta key to remove from datastore
pointer to delta or outcome::failure on error
Close shuts down the CRDT datastore and worker threads. It should not be used afterwards.

briefdescription.para: Configure which topic this datastore should filter on.

detaileddescription.para: When processing or rebroadcasting Merkle-DAG links, only those whose name exactly matches the topic set via this call will be considered.

parameterdescription.para: The topic name to use when filtering links. Only links whose IPLDLinkImpl::getName() equals this string will be processed.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast heads for the specified topics.

parameterdescription.para: Vector of topic names to broadcast heads for

simplesect.para: outcome::success on success, or outcome::failure on error

briefdescription.para: Handles when a CID broadcast gets received If the CID is not known triggers HandleRootCIDBlock.
Handles a root CID block by creating a job to fetch and process its content.

parameterdescription.para: The root CID to be handled

simplesect.para: Success if the Root Job was created, or failure otherwise

briefdescription.para: Creates a RootCIDJob for the given root CID.

parameterdescription.para: The root CID to create the job for

simplesect.para: Success if Root Job created, or failure otherwise

briefdescription.para: Gets the links to fetch for a given node in a job.

parameterdescription.para: The root job of the current links to fetch

simplesect.para: List of CIDs to fetch, or failure otherwise

briefdescription.para: Fetches the nodes for the given links and root job.

parameterdescription.para: The root job of the current links to fetch
The links to fetch

simplesect.para: Success if the nodes were fetched, or failure otherwise

briefdescription.para: Gets the Delta from a given IPLD node, filtering it if it wasn't created by self.

parameterdescription.para: The IPLD node to get the Delta from
True if the node was created by self, false otherwise

simplesect.para: The Delta contained in the node, or failure otherwise

briefdescription.para: Merges the data from a given Delta into the CRDT set.

parameterdescription.para: The CID of the node from which the Delta was obtained
The Delta to be merged

simplesect.para: Success if the Delta was merged, or failure otherwise

parameterdescription.para: The job received by either HandleCIDBroadcast or by AddDAGNode

simplesect.para: Success if the job was processed, or failure otherwise

detaileddescription.para:
Sync ensures that all the data under the given prefix is flushed to disk in the underlying datastore
returns outcome::success on success or outcome::failure otherwise

Helper funtion to print Merkle-DAG records
aCID
CID of DAG record
aDepth
depth used for indenting printed records
aSet
set of CIDs to print
returns outcome::success on success or outcome::failure otherwise
Regularly send out a list of heads that we have not recently seen

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::set< CID > &cids, const std::string &topic, boost::optional< libp2p::peer::PeerInfo > peerInfo=boost::none)
memberdef.name: Broadcast

briefdescription.para: Broadcasts a set of CIDs. Encodes and broadcasts the provided list of CIDs.

parameterdescription.para: The list of CIDs to broadcast.
The topic to broadcast to.
Optional peer info to avoid repeated GetPeerInfo calls.

simplesect.para: outcome::success on success, or outcome::failure if an error occurs.

detaileddescription.para:
EncodeBroadcast encodes list of CIDs to CRDT broadcast data
heads
list of CIDs
data encoded into Buffer data or outcome::failure on error

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::pair< CID, std::string > > &aHeads, const std::shared_ptr< Delta > &aDelta, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &topics) const
memberdef.name: CreateIPLDNode

detaileddescription.para:
CreateIPLDNode add block node to DAGSyncer
aHeads
list of CIDs to add to node as IPLD links
aDelta
Delta to serialize into IPLD node
topics
Topics to add as links
IPLD node or outcome::failure on error

AddDAGNode adds node to DAGSyncer and processes new blocks.
node
Node to add and process
CID or outcome::failure on error

SyncDatastore sync heads and set datastore
aKeyList
all heads and the set entries related to the given prefix
returns outcome::success on success or outcome::failure otherwise

EncodeBroadcastStatic encodes list of CIDs to CRDT broadcast data
heads
list of CIDs
data encoded into Buffer data or outcome::failure on error

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< RocksDB > aDatastore, const HierarchicalKey &aKey, std::shared_ptr< DAGSyncer > aDagSyncer, std::shared_ptr< Broadcaster > aBroadcaster, std::shared_ptr< CrdtOptions > aOptions)
memberdef.name: CrdtDatastore

briefdescription.para: Forward declaration of CRDT Set class.

detaileddescription.para: CRDT datastore class based on https://github.com/ipfs/go-ds-crdt

node.label: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
